— 8 —

BEACH RULES

  1. No. 1
    Mandatory alcoholic beverage before noon.
  2. No. 2
    Rosé before responsibilities.
  3. No. 3
    Bogeys and better are celebrated. Triples are max.
  4. No. 4
    No one is too old for beach bikes.
  5. No. 5
    Jimmy is a probationary member.
  6. No. 6
    Elizabeth and Clara have full guest privileges.
  7. No. 7
    Good music is mandatory.
  8. No. 8
    All roads lead back to PTFS.
  9. No. 9
    Curfew is 10 PM unless we all agree to an extension.
  10. No. 10
    Everybody PARTAYs on 30A.
Established at PTFS Headquarters  ·  WaterColor, Florida
— 9 —
